title: neobesseya macdougallii
intro: Neobesseya macdougallii, also known as MacDougall's besseya, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae, specifically found in the alpine meadows of British Columbia, Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and stomach discomfort. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Neobesseya macdougallii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
